titleStmt.title: SII 9.285: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 285. (A.R. No. 470 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE COMPOUND OF THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT HOLAL, HADAGALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and not dated. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions some Daṇḍanāyakas (names lost). It mentions some gift of land made for the service of a god (name lost). The Mahājanas of the village Gaṇḍarādityana-Poḷal are described here as observing religious rites and practising yōga. They were also brave warriors.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷika cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatribhuvanamalla
dēvara vijaya pravarddhamā
namācaṁdrārkkatā vīḍinoḷu
sukhasaṁkathā svasti samadhi
gatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāpracaṇḍa
daṁḍanāyaka dra
ma E mitra
turuvarēvaṁta mahi
damaged
dēvargge gaṁdha dhū
panaivēdyakkaṁ da suṁkamaṁ
biṭṭarī dharmmamaṁ svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānu
ṣṭānajapasamādhīśīḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ gaṇḍarāditya
napoḷalayūroḍeyapramukhamahājanaṁgaḷu diṁbaru © svasti sa
mastaguṇasampannaru nuḍidante gaṁḍarlōkaikavīraru kalaha ṇḍaru piridittu
maṟevaru maṟevuge kāvaru śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararu dharmmakārādhyaru
gelvaṁgasādhyaru sanmānadānigaḷu gōtrapavitraru sujanaciṁtāmaṇiga
ttutavaru kādisōlaru caturbbhāṣāviṣayabirudatriṇētrarāhavaṣaṇmukha
ru pariva bhaṁḍiya kāliṁ kōvaru maṇalasaravivosevaru beṭṭiḻimita
ru javana �voseya kīḷuvaru māriyatōḷa ko
lvaru Āḷigāḷdanaṁ kolvaru tappetappuvaru
janaru nāgaThe stone is broken away after this.
Digital edition of SII 9.285 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
